title: What happens when Scripture comes before your phone
caption:
You have about 90 seconds each morning before a screen gets to you. What you do with those 90 seconds decides the frame for the next 16 hours.

The phone offers noise, comparison, and a dopamine hit you didn't ask for. The Word offers an anchor. The difference isn't just spiritual — it shows in your patience at noon, your self-control at 3 PM, the call you make when the day goes sideways.

"I have hidden your word in my heart" — Psalm 119:11. You can't hide something you've only glimpsed at. But one verse, held slowly on the drive in, will do more for you than a chapter scrolled while half asleep.

Do it for 30 days. You won't go back.

Save this. Share it with the brother who asks why your mornings feel different.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #discipline #manofgod #discipleship #christianliving #morningroutine
